subject: Invoice INV-2026-0006 – May FactSet Workstation & Analytics Services
preview: Attached is your May invoice for FactSet workstation licenses, data feeds, and analytics modules.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0006 covering FactSet workstation seats, fundamentals data feed, portfolio analytics, estimates, and premium support for May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 44,932.88
Due Date: June 18, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Please remit payment by the due date and reference the invoice number on your transfer. For any questions, contact our accounts receivable team.

Best regards,
FactSet Research Systems Inc. – Billing Department
